steps.label: ArgoCD • login
steps.description: NOTE: ArgoCD requires auth. webreel can't preserve session state, so we either (a) skip the login click and start the recording on an already-logged-in tab via `webreel preview` to set up state then `record` immediately (fragile), or (b) record login + use `username: admin` / a TEST password (rotate after demo).

steps.label: inference-api • Synced • Healthy
steps.description: The whole point: ArgoCD has reconciled the annotation bump and the live cluster matches git.

steps.label: open app
steps.description: Show the resource tree — Deployment → ReplicaSet → 2 Pods, all Synced.
